sourcePrompt: An OH-6 Cayuse "Loach" light observation helicopter, tiny at about seven meters, perched on slender skids. An egg-shaped cabin with a big rounded glass front takes up barely a third of the length; a thin tail boom runs back to a small tail rotor beside an upswept V-tail. A four-bladed main rotor rides close above the rounded roof. The whole machine looks light enough to dart sideways. Olive-drab, compact and nimble.
